pages.raw_text:
After a long siege of disaster the
Northern Pacific finally announces
that II can now run trains safely
over the Clearwater branch. The last
two weeks have been for the line a
history of wrecks. washouts ana
slides. Yesterday morning the first
train in week was run over the
branch to Sites. The announcement
was greeted with joy by the travelling
public held up at Lewiston. Idaho.


1t is probable that until the season
when slides are likely to occur the
trains will be run up the branch in
the morning and back in the after
noon. making the whole trip by day.
light. No attention will be paid to
any connection with the Spokane
trains until the dangers have been
eliminated. The best service possible
is planned.


There Is a congested condition of
freight along the line. This freight
is now being run into Lewiston as
fast as possible.
